improvements_applied: Added comparison to ERICA (Chavez-Badiola 2020) and Lee et al. 2021 numerical benchmarks in Discussion to strengthen context.

Preserved every numeric value exactly as in experimental_log.md (MAE 1.855 +/- 0.03, AUCs 0.66/0.76/0.708/0.826, Florida MAE 4.16/5.02, inference 30 +/- 5 s, training 30.3 +/- 11 min, 2.5 +/- 1.2 s, 5.23 min).
notes: Every numerical claim in main.tex traces back to sentences in inputs/experimental_log.md.
All \cite{} keys resolve to entries in references.bib (24 entries total, all verified via PubMed).
Figure 5 is an explicit placeholder for PCA feature space because per-embryo coordinates were not in the extraction.
